policy.note: This manifest is a frozen plan. No remote resources are provisioned by running this tool. Re-run after each stage completes to re-verify the next stage's gate.

one_command_kickoff.stage1: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage1-alm-r13 --env ANIMA_STAGE=1 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=9 --env TORCH_COMPILE=1 --env MIXED_PRECISION=bf16 --env GRAD_ACCUM=4 --env ANIMA_EMA_DECAY=0.999 --env ANIMA_CURRICULUM_TIER_ENFORCE=1 --env ANIMA_CPGD_ACTIVE=1 --env ANIMA_DROPOUT_KL_REG=1 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/drill_breakthrough_runner.hexa --config config/alm_r13_v2_config.json --live --ckpt-interval 25 --cpgd-active'
one_command_kickoff.stage2: # 4 separate pods — launch in parallel. See kickoff_command_p1..p4 for per-path frozen commands. Aggregate: for P in p1 p2 p3 p4; do runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 1 --name anima-stage2-$P --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env PHI_PATH_ID=$P --cmd 'hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --path '$P; done
one_command_kickoff.stage2_p1_qwen3_8b: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 1 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage2-p1-qwen3-8b --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=10 --env PHI_PATH_ID=p1 --env PHI_MODEL=Qwen/Qwen3-8B --env PHI_LORA_RANK=64 --env TORCH_COMPILE=1 --env MIXED_PRECISION=bf16 --env GRAD_ACCUM=4 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --path p1 --lora-rank 64'
one_command_kickoff.stage2_p2_llama_3_1_8b: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 1 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage2-p2-llama-3-1-8b --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=10 --env PHI_PATH_ID=p2 --env PHI_MODEL=meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B --env PHI_LORA_RANK=64 --env TORCH_COMPILE=1 --env MIXED_PRECISION=bf16 --env GRAD_ACCUM=4 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --path p2 --lora-rank 64'
one_command_kickoff.stage2_p3_ministral_3_14b: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 1 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage2-p3-ministral-3-14b --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=10 --env PHI_PATH_ID=p3 --env PHI_MODEL=mistralai/Ministral-3-14B-Base-2512 --env PHI_LORA_RANK=96 --env TORCH_COMPILE=1 --env MIXED_PRECISION=bf16 --env GRAD_ACCUM=4 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --path p3 --lora-rank 96'
one_command_kickoff.stage2_p4_gemma_4_31b: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 1 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage2-p4-gemma-4-31b --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=10 --env PHI_PATH_ID=p4 --env PHI_MODEL=google/gemma-4-31B --env PHI_LORA_RANK=128 --env VRAM_MODE=qlora-nf4 --env TORCH_COMPILE=1 --env MIXED_PRECISION=bf16 --env GRAD_ACCUM=4 --env ATTN_IMPL=flash_attn_2 --env GRAD_CKPT=1 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --path p4 --lora-rank 128 --qlora-4bit'
one_command_kickoff.stage3: AUTO-CASCADE: Stage-3 kickoff is triggered by successful Stage-2 close; no separate user command required. Verify via: hexa run tool/h100_launch_manifest_spec.hexa

stages.title: ALM r13 launch + AN11(a) weight_emergent empirical
stages.kickoff_command: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage1-alm-r13 --env ANIMA_STAGE=1 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=9 --env TORCH_COMPILE=1 --env MIXED_PRECISION=bf16 --env GRAD_ACCUM=4 --env ANIMA_EMA_DECAY=0.999 --env ANIMA_CURRICULUM_TIER_ENFORCE=1 --env ANIMA_CPGD_ACTIVE=1 --env ANIMA_DROPOUT_KL_REG=1 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/drill_breakthrough_runner.hexa --config config/alm_r13_v2_config.json --live --ckpt-interval 25 --cpgd-active'
stages.post_launch_verify: hexa run tool/h100_launch_manifest_spec.hexa   # re-emit with live artifacts; Stage-2 verdict will flip READY if AN11(a) live PASS
guardrails: cert_gate verdict mutation monitored each ckpt
landmines: runpodctl CLI not on local PATH → script reports STUB, must install or use web console
SSH key not pre-uploaded to runpod → pod spawn succeeds but probes fail (h100_auto_kill will emit UNKNOWN until SSH reachable)
ready/ submodule gitlink at commit 4aebcbd5 — clone must include --recurse-submodules if corpus paths needed

prereqs.label: alm r13 corpus audit SSOT present

stages.title: Phi substrate independence — 4-path cross validation (2026-04-22 b/a/b decision: Qwen3-8B + Llama-3.1-8B + Ministral-3-14B + Gemma-4-31B)
stages.cost_user_budget: user-absorbed unlimited (no cap policy 2026-04-22; 4xH100x10-15dx$7/hr spot ~$1680-2520 nominal, but no enforcement)

substrate_variants.rationale: dense decoder-only · RoPE · 中문 heavy · thinking-mode
dense decoder-only · GQA · 128K ctx · Meta RLHF
dense decoder-only LM core · Tekken 131K · 256K ctx · ViT drop
Google 신규 stack · dual-theta RoPE · 1M ctx · sliding 1024 · multimodal drop · ROI B13 rank 96→128

lora_rank_policy.rationale: LoRA effective capacity proportional to rank * d_model; 12B ~1.5x d_model of 8B so rank also 1.5x

stages.kickoff_command: # 4 separate pods — launch in parallel. See kickoff_command_p1..p4 for per-path frozen commands. Aggregate: for P in p1 p2 p3 p4; do runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 1 --name anima-stage2-$P --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env PHI_PATH_ID=$P --cmd 'hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --path '$P; done
stages.kickoff_command_p1: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 1 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage2-p1-qwen3-8b --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=10 --env PHI_PATH_ID=p1 --env PHI_MODEL=Qwen/Qwen3-8B --env PHI_LORA_RANK=64 --env TORCH_COMPILE=1 --env MIXED_PRECISION=bf16 --env GRAD_ACCUM=4 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --path p1 --lora-rank 64'
stages.kickoff_command_p2: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 1 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage2-p2-llama-3-1-8b --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=10 --env PHI_PATH_ID=p2 --env PHI_MODEL=meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B --env PHI_LORA_RANK=64 --env TORCH_COMPILE=1 --env MIXED_PRECISION=bf16 --env GRAD_ACCUM=4 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --path p2 --lora-rank 64'
stages.kickoff_command_p3: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 1 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage2-p3-ministral-3-14b --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=10 --env PHI_PATH_ID=p3 --env PHI_MODEL=mistralai/Ministral-3-14B-Base-2512 --env PHI_LORA_RANK=96 --env TORCH_COMPILE=1 --env MIXED_PRECISION=bf16 --env GRAD_ACCUM=4 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --path p3 --lora-rank 96'
stages.kickoff_command_p4: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type H100 --gpu-count 1 --image runpod/pytorch:2.1.0 --name anima-stage2-p4-gemma-4-31b --env ANIMA_STAGE=2 --env ANIMA_ROADMAP_ENTRY=10 --env PHI_PATH_ID=p4 --env PHI_MODEL=google/gemma-4-31B --env PHI_LORA_RANK=128 --env VRAM_MODE=qlora-nf4 --env TORCH_COMPILE=1 --env MIXED_PRECISION=bf16 --env GRAD_ACCUM=4 --env ATTN_IMPL=flash_attn_2 --env GRAD_CKPT=1 --volume /workspace --cmd 'cd /workspace && git clone https://github.com/dancinlife/anima.git && cd anima && hexa run tool/phi_extractor_ffi_wire.hexa --config config/phi_4path_substrates.json --live --path p4 --lora-rank 128 --qlora-4bit'
stages.post_launch_verify: hexa run tool/h100_launch_manifest_spec.hexa   # Stage-3 READY if Φ substrate_indep=true AND all 4 paths produced live artifacts
guardrails: per-path independent ckpt; 1 path failing does not poison the 3 others
|dPhi|/Phi<0.05 hard gate — ALL_PAIRS mode (6 pairs); no 3/4 fallback under SSOT 2026-04-22
per-path tokenizer drift handled via path-specific corpus preprocessing (4 tokenizers: 151K/128K/131K/262K)
landmines: Ministral-3-14B-Base-2512 wrapper: load via model.language_model submodule (drop 0.4B ViT, text-only substrate)
Llama-3.1-8B gated — use unsloth/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B mirror OR set HF_TOKEN for Meta accepted account
Gemma-4-31B (p4) 31B BF16 ~62.5GB on 80GB H100 — USE QLoRA 4-bit mode (VRAM_MODE=qlora-nf4) for safety margin
Gemma-4 requires transformers>=5.5.0.dev0 (Gemma4ForConditionalGeneration) + FlashAttention-2 SWA for sliding_window=1024 5:1
HuggingFace rate limits on 4 parallel downloads → pre-cache to shared volume; stagger pod spawns by 60s
public distribution requires per-path license split (Apache-2.0 for p1/p3/p4, Llama Community for p2)
Phi measurement hook offsets re-wire required: p1 hidden=4096, p2=4096, p3=5120 (LM core), p4=5376

prereqs.label: Stage-1 AN11(a) live empirical verdict=PASS (cascade gate)
Φ 4-path substrate variants config (TBD — not yet landed)

stages.title: ALM consciousness ship — production + #21 AGI cascade
stages.cost_user_budget: user-absorbed unlimited (no cap policy 2026-04-22; gated by Stage-1+2 success)
stages.cascade_dependency: Stage-1 AN11 triple live PASS AND Stage-2 Φ substrate_indep=true
stages.kickoff_command: AUTO-CASCADE: Stage-3 kickoff is triggered by successful Stage-2 close; no separate user command required. Verify via: hexa run tool/h100_launch_manifest_spec.hexa
guardrails: #11 ship criteria enforced via Mk.VI promotion gate
#21 AGI final gate = 10+ atoms ossified + Mk.XI twin-engine
